page.t: %1(ship name) \(%2\)(ship ID code) claimed and sent to %3(dock name) in %4(sector name).
%1(ship name) \(%2\)(ship ID code) claimed but no dock was found to send it to.
%1(ship name) \(%2\)(ship ID code) claimed %3(claimed ship name) \(%4\)(claimed ship ID code).
Claims abandoned ships in designated sectors.
Sectors to look for abandoned ships.
Automatically send claimed ship to nearest equipment dock, wharf, or shipyard as appropriate?
Send a notification to me when a ship is claimed?
Dock to the nearest safe station when nothing to do?
